name: Scalloped Cabbage with Nutmeg Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam cabbage in a small amount of boiling salted water until crisp-tender; drain.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan.
3. Stir in flour. Remove from heat and blend in milk gradually.
4. Add salt, pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg. Simmer until thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Add 4 tablespoons cheese, stirring until melted.
6. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice.
7. Place half of the cabbage in a greased baking dish.
8. Add half of the cracker crumbs.
9. Pour sauce over crumbs.
10. Top with remaining cheese and sprinkle with nutmeg.
11. Bake at 450° for 10 minutes or until crumbs are browned.
